explanation.summary: Fats are carrying this food most, while minerals are the biggest drag. It lands in A tier.
explanation.whyThisTier: This food lands in A tier with an overall score of 45 from a base nutrition score of 42. Context lifted it by 3 points.

topPros.title: vitamin C reputation is a real strength
topPros.explanation: This is one of the clearest viewer-recognisable wins in the fruit category.

topCons.title: easy to eat quickly when it is very sweet

closing.summary: Orange has a genuinely strong overall case. the practical downsides are real, but they do not outweigh the upside. best when you want sweetness that still earns its place nutritionally.
